mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_instance WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_instance WHERE starter = #{starter} AND flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_workflow_instance (id, workflow_code, business_key, form_data_id, current_node, status, starter, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{workflowCode}, #{businessKey}, #{formDataId}, #{currentNode}, #{status}, #{starter}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
